response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep systems thinking, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of staff-level technical strategy in AI-native environments, has no demonstrated Python mastery, and his resume overloads with unrelated projects and inconsistent job titles that obscure his actual impact in distributed systems or AI-driven engineering.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Proven experience with high-throughput systems and low-latency architectures
Strong operational and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, CI/CD tooling)
concerns: No clear evidence of Python mastery — critical must-have skill
Job titles (e.g., 'Staff Software Engineer') lack context and may be inflated
Minimal evidence of stakeholder coordination or agile leadership at staff level
